_comment: Lab re-certification record. The engine pin (host-1 instance.json -> factorio.version) MUST equal factorio_version below, or scripts/lint-version-certification.mjs (npm run lint:version-certification, gated in CI) FAILS. A pin bump means: re-run EVERY tests/*-lab runner on the new pin, record the conclusion commit per lab here, bump factorio_version + certified_at, all in the same PR. The labs are the drift-detection suite; this record is their signed-off certificate. No escape hatch. This rule exists because 2.0.76->2.0.77 shipped real LuaSpacePlatform.destroy() semantics drift that went uncertified until a campaign audit forced the labs to re-run (measured in tests/engine-repin-lab, commit 00e44c7).

evidence.conclusion: measured export-scan residuals (the belt-restoration drift floor behind the strict gate)
temperature-key drift is a phantom (steam merges pre-export + round-trips exactly); frozen-world fluid injection + temperature-merge boundaries measured
held-item capacity is governed by the dest force's inserter research (CI bonus 0 vs local 11); set_stack clamps to physical hand capacity
the synchronous held-item restore pass keeps game.tick, crafting_progress, and the restored inserter hand stable through the strict count (no craft window)
re-pinned engine behaviors on 2.0.77; measured the LuaSpacePlatform.destroy(0)/destroy(60) semantics drift from 2.0.76
destination-hold stage/read completeness measured; isolated machine buffers survive the hold
